'''Borga Besadii Diori''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] from the [[Besadii/Legends|Besadii]] clan.

==Biography==
Borga was the parent of [[Randa Besadii Diori]] and led the clan after the demise of [[Durga Besadii Tai]], responsible for the failed [[Darksaber (superweapon)|Darksaber]] Project. She frequently alternated between [[Gender/Legends|female]] and male. During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] in [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]], the Hutt in her female form negotiated a truce between the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] and the Hutts, to let them occupy some of its [[Realspace/Legends|space]]. However, the Yuuzhan Vong had other plans and planned to betray the Hutts. To complicate the matter, the Hutts were negotiating with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] to sell the information on the invaders' next attack. When the Yuuzhan Vong found out, they immediately attacked [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt space]]. Borga led the Hutt defenses of [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]], however, his attempt was futile and Hutt space was conquered, forcing the Hutts to move to planets like [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] and other Hutt establishments. Borga and many other Hutts, however, remained on Nal Hutta as prisoners. The Hutt tried to persuade the Yuuzhan Vong into releasing them.
